creator: martin@waschbuesch.de
text:
Created attachment 172771
apply upstream patch to fix EAS sync

Hey Euan,

I have already tested it and the proposed patch does enable EAS users to sync with SOGo again.
I have created a patch to implement this and upped PORTREVISION to 1. (see attached diff).

Hope this helps.

Martin

PS: I agree that after all the effort put into the new UI, stability should be the main  focus again!
